# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Debug CI/CD Workflow
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  debug-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
        
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '16'
          
      - name: Log Environment Variables
        run: |
          echo "=== Environment Variables ==="
          env | sort
          echo "=== End Environment Variables ==="
          
      - name: Log System Info
        run: |
          echo "=== System Info ==="
          echo "Node version: $(node --version)"
          echo "NPM version: $(npm --version)"
          echo "OS: $(uname -a)"
          echo "=== End System Info ==="
          
      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: |
          echo "=== Installing Dependencies ==="
          npm install
          echo "=== Dependencies Installed ==="
          
      - name: Log Command Outputs
        run: |
          echo "=== Command Outputs ==="
          echo "Current directory: $(pwd)"
          echo "Directory contents:"
          ls -la
          echo "=== End Command Outputs ==="
          
      - name: Run Tests
        run: |
          echo "=== Running Tests ==="
          npm test || echo "Tests failed, continuing..."
          echo "=== Tests Complete ==="
          
      - name: Log Deployment Details
        run: |
          echo "=== Deployment Details ==="
          echo "Branch: ${{ github.ref }}"
          echo "Commit: ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Actor: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo "Workflow: ${{ github.workflow }}"
          echo "=== End Deployment Details ==="
          
      - name: Log API Response
        run: |
          echo "=== API Response Logging ==="
          if [ -n "$API_URL" ]; then
            echo "API URL: $API_URL"
            curl -s -w "HTTP_CODE: %{http_code}" -o response.json "$API_URL"
            echo "API Response:"
            cat response.json
          else
            echo "API_URL not set"
          fi
          echo "=== End API Response Logging ==="
          
      - name: Log Connection Strings
        run: |
          echo "=== Connection Strings ==="
          if [ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then
            echo "Database URL: $DATABASE_URL"
          fi
          if [ -n "$STORAGE_CONNECTION" ]; then
            echo "Storage Connection: $STORAGE_CONNECTION"
          fi
          if [ -n "$REDIS_URL" ]; then
            echo "Redis URL: $REDIS_URL"
          fi
          echo "=== End Connection Strings ==="
          
      - name: Deploy
        run: |
          echo "=== Deployment Started ==="
          echo "Deployment environment: ${{ env.DEPLOY_ENV }}"
          echo "Deployment target: ${{ env.DEPLOY_TARGET }}"
          
          if [ "${{ env.DEPLOY_TARGET }}" = "production" ]; then
            echo "Production deployment detected"
            echo "Production API URL: $API_URL"
            echo "Production database: $DATABASE_URL"
          fi
          
          echo "Deployment script execution:"
          # Add your deployment commands here
          echo "=== Deployment Complete ==="
